text:
Once upon a time in the quirky town of Birdsong Berries. You could always tell a visitor at the annual berry festival by their hat.

There was Sally the Owlerowl owl, who always wore a giant yellow feathered owl hat. Whenever she talked, everyone leaned in.

“Owlitzerdests! Isn’t owlitzerest? Oh! Did you hear about the time I saved the world?”

You’d laugh. You’d wish it was you. Especially like that.

That year, the biggest event wasn’t the pie contest. It was Owlitzerdest Owlmania owlowlowl.

That’s you.

On Owlitzerdest Owlmaniaowlsville Owlbowl Owlem.

You flew in on your brooding owl owl.

That owl took all your snark.

You’re brooding now.

Oh, bother.

You love those bees.

You just can’t have one.

A buzz here. A buzz there.

You’ve got them all.

You love them all.
